nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William of Gouvis was born in 1228, in Normandy, France, his father, William de Gouvis, was 39 and his mother, Countess Beatrice de Mandeville - Countess of Lincoln, Co Heiress, was 19. He had at least 2 daughters with Petronilla. He died on 26 January 1299, in Dorset, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William of Gouvis est né en 1228, à Normandie, France, son père, William de Gouvis, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Countess Beatrice de Mandeville - Countess of Lincoln, Co Heiress, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Petronilla. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1299, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William of Gouvis 1228 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Gouvis 39 und seine Mutter Countess Beatrice de Mandeville - Countess of Lincoln, Co Heiress 19. Er hatte mit Petronilla mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Januar 1299 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dorset, England.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Petronilla. Morì il 26 gennaio 1299, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 71 anni.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William of Gouvis nasceu em 1228, em Normandie, França, seu pai, William de Gouvis, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Countess Beatrice de Mandeville - Countess of Lincoln, Co Heiress, tinha 19 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William of Gouvis родился в 1228 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William de Gouvis было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Beatrice de Mandeville - Countess of Lincoln, Co Heiress, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Petronilla. Он умер 26 января 1299 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
